locations.caption: Watching sloths move through the emerald canopy.
Searching for the iconic Red Poison Dart Frogs of Red Frog Beach.
A rare encounter with the gentle manatees in the secret lagoons.
Dolphins playing in the wake of our boat at Dolphin Bay.
Snorkeling through the crystal clear roots of Mangrove Island.
Unwinding on the uninhabited white sands of Zapatilla.
